prompt: Create a workflow triggered by a cron every Monday at 8am and also by an HTTP POST at /reports/generate. The workflow gathers data from three sources in parallel: sales metrics, customer feedback scores, and support ticket statistics. After all data is collected, merge the results and generate a formatted report. Then branch based on a threshold: if the overall score is above 80, send a congratulations message to the team channel. If between 60-80, send a regular update. If below 60, escalate to management with action items. Finally, archive the report data.

checklist.item: Has a cron trigger that fires every Monday at 8am
Has an HTTP POST trigger at /reports/generate
Fetches data from three sources in parallel: sales metrics, customer feedback scores, and support ticket statistics
Merges results from all three parallel data sources after all have completed
Generates a formatted report from the merged data
Branches into three paths based on the overall score threshold value
Has a step to archive the report data after branching logic completes
Branch condition: if overall score is above 80, sends a congratulations message to the team channel
Branch condition: if overall score is between 60 and 80 (inclusive), sends a regular update message
Branch condition: if overall score is below 60, escalates to management with action items included in the message
The merged result includes data from all three sources: sales metrics, customer feedback scores, and support ticket statistics
The formatted report is derived from the merged dataset before branching occurs
